mapper.sql: id, stock_code, market, stock_name, trade_date, daily_return, quote_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_market_current ( stock_code, market, stock_name, trade_date, daily_return, quote_time ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{market}, #{stockName}, #{tradeDate}, #{dailyReturn}, #{quoteTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), stock_name = #{stockName}, trade_date = #{tradeDate}, daily_return = #{dailyReturn}, quote_time = #{quoteTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT FROM stock_market_current WHERE stock_code IS NOT NULL AND stock_code != '' ORDER BY stock_code ASC, market ASC

SELECT FROM stock_market_current WHERE CONCAT(stock_code, '#', COALESCE(market, '')) IN
#{stockKey}
